title: rubus × praelatiformis
intro: Rubus × praelatiformis, a hybrid species of raspberry, is a cross between the native black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the introduced red raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × praelatiformis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × praelatiformis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies for its potential to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues.
